ThingDef.description: The official uniform of Heyran hierarchs.
ThingDef.label: Heyran hierarch's attire

ThingDef.description: A pair of bell-shaped headdresses that make a delicate sound when the wearer walks.
ThingDef.label: Heyran euphona hair clips

ThingDef.description: The official uniform of Heyran shamans.
ThingDef.label: Heyran shaman's attire

ThingDef.description: A Heyran style white hood decorated with charms and glazed beads.
ThingDef.label: Heyran shaman head wear

ThingDef.description: The official uniform of Heyran prophetesses.
ThingDef.label: Heyran prophetess' attire

ThingDef.description: A silk hat decorated with colorful feathers, covered with animal leather and gold leaf.
ThingDef.label: Heyran prophetess crown

ThingDef.description: A luxurious shirt embroidered with a flower pattern.
ThingDef.label: Heyran embroidered shirt

ThingDef.description: This outfit features a light jacket layered over a gauze skirt.
ThingDef.label: Heyran jacket and skirt

ThingDef.description: A Heyran style casual coat.
ThingDef.label: Heyran short coat

ThingDef.description: A good-looking muslin skirt with a flared silhouette.
ThingDef.label: Heyran bubble skirt

ThingDef.description: An elegant dress featuring a tube top design.
ThingDef.label: Heyran long dress

ThingDef.description: A piece of clothing sewn with a hard-wearing fabric, a favorite of laborers.
ThingDef.label: Heyran Jianghu suit

ThingDef.description: A simple sleeveless top, light and comfortable for warm weather.
ThingDef.label: Heyran sleeveless shirt

ThingDef.description: A relatively cheap cloak made of leather or fabric.
ThingDef.label: Heyran simple cloak

ThingDef.description: A waxed cloak that keeps the wearer dry during the rain.
ThingDef.label: Heyran rain cloak

ThingDef.description: A warm cloak that features a fluffy collar.
ThingDef.label: Heyran winter coat

ThingDef.description: A dark-colored tight-fitting suit that helps the wearer hide their whereabouts at night.
ThingDef.label: Heyran stealth suit

ThingDef.description: An asymmetrical costume decorated with skulls and feathers.
ThingDef.label: Heyran eldritch robe

ThingDef.description: This belt is equipped with many tools and is a must-have for Heyran artisans. It can get very dirty, so it is recommended not to bring it to the kitchen, or you may find metal shavings in your food.
ThingDef.label: Heyran worker's belt

ThingDef.description: A Heyran style cooking utensil that can be creatively used as a shield or a piece of armor.
ThingDef.label: Heyran Wok

ThingDef.description: The standard armor of the Heyran army.
ThingDef.label: Heyran soldier's armor

ThingDef.description: A suit of armor consisting of many individual fish scale-like plates. It is surprisingly protective for its weight, though it only covers the upper body.
ThingDef.label: Heyran koi armor

ThingDef.description: A set of advanced armor designed for the Heyran Forbidden Army.
ThingDef.label: Heyran Forbidden Army's panoply

ThingDef.description: A suit of armor designed for agile sword fighters. Heyran armorers adopted the technology of flak vests and applied additional plates to give the limbs equal protection.
ThingDef.label: Heyran sword master's panoply

ThingDef.description: A strip of cloth wrapped around the wearer's head and tied in a knot at the front.
ThingDef.label: Heyran headwrap

ThingDef.description: A wide-brimmed hat that keeps the wearer cool in summer and dry on rainy days.
ThingDef.label: Heyran Jianghu hat

ThingDef.description: A pair of soft fur earmuffs that keep the wearer warm in winter.
ThingDef.label: Heyran earmuffs

ThingDef.description: The standard helmet of the Heyran army.
ThingDef.label: Heyran soldier's helmet

ThingDef.description: The helmet that matches the armor of the Forbidden Army.
ThingDef.label: Heyran Forbidden Army's helmet
